name: Returns Risk Concerns in Grocery Staples

representative_quotes.text: Blinkit has started business in my area recently,and though service was good initially,now just within few months service deteriorated drastically.They are delaying on every order,sending expired product,or on the day of expiry day,and sometimes even tring to erase expiary date by rubbing - and many items in each order turning out to be having one or other issue As a customer it's becoming buying harrasment in return of paying money. so turning out as a pathetically unprofessional compay,

Blinkit provides very low quality items.. on the other hand there are no return options.. simple saying.. as per the description items are delivered... if the customer is not satisfied with the quality.. there are no return options... very worst product.. don't buy anything from blinkit

Delivers damaged products and customer care denies any request of course doesn't want to exchange or return money and just keeps asking for reviews...what a joke this app has always been and just keeps apologizing without any resolution.. mediocre service

every time there is some problem in the order.... sometimes product is missing, sometimes less quantity, sometimes poor quality, every time there is some problem 😞 every time I have to complaint, and they give refund or replacement but it's very frustrating 😕

80 percent of the time i have to replace or refund, so much hassle in talking to customer care and retracking pickup and re pick or delivery or refund status. quality control should be checked for vendor's beforehand,

so convenient, easy and quick for a mother like me, thank you so much for existing 🫶🏻🤗 your app is very user friendly and easy to operate and I like the most is there is so much variety available in every category 👍🏻 i enjoy shopping here 🤗

"Absolute life-saver! I live in Kapurthala, and getting daily essentials and fresh produce in just 10-15 minutes is still mind-blowing to me. The app interface is incredibly clean, and the delivery partners are always polite and quick. Perfect for busy professionals and last-minute household needs!"
Best app fast delivery ! It also has imported groceries . Best Ever!
it is very good app and it deliver us groceries in👌 10 minutes

this app is great even small to small things available in this app I really love it everything is available in this platform i really injoy to order any thing and delivery timing was best within 10 minutes the delivery partner is at my location

name: Trust & Quality Concerns in Electronics Accessories

representative_quotes.text: Yaar, charging cable ki charging speed to check kr dete, us se charge krna hota hai, latakna nahi hume us se, jo uski majbuti check kara rahe
very chor company h ye 200g ke Jagan par 138g dedal h ye blinkit wala company. stopped application

sabse gande product dekhte hain yah log complaint karne ka koi option bhi nahin Hai Maine order mangaya aur paper to bilkul defected tha Gandi quality thi mene kal 10 july ko bhi complaint ki thi 24 ghante ki pure ho gaye hain abhi tak Koi sunvaee nahin hui hai blanket bahut hi Ganda Hai please aap jo bhi product mangte Hain usko ek bar Apne se check kar le Mujhe 24 ghante ka time diya tha blanket ne maine bahut badi galti kar di inke review nahin dekha iska Koi return policy nahin Hai

clever very smart Agar kisi ke sath galat bhi Karoge To vah negative review bhi nahin likh sakta Kyunki vah post hi nahin hoga tuta Hua Saman dete Ho uske bad one fourth cost offer karte ho sharm aani chahie kya ISI ke liye ham log aapse order Karte Hain Mere Sath teen Char bar Tum Logon Ne thaggi Kiya Hai Koi customer care support Nahin Hai Koi proper solution Nahin Hai sirf bevkuf banaya hua hai tab jakar Meri review de raha literally disappointing
customer care se baat nhi ho paati hai aur delivery boy aadhe raaste me pahunch kar bolta hai ki aapka ek item damage hai poora order cancel krwa dijiye jaldi kariye yeh facility hai app ki
Quality service,best to order items in a hurry and delivery experience so far is excellent.😊🍭
very fast service...products also come in good condition...no expiry products,it come fresh and nitly packaging 📦
The delivery is so fast. I like blanket products they are so fresh and clean. 😍👍🏻🫶🏻❤️🌈💗🙏🏻🦄
very fast delivery affordable price Only quality items 👌 Delivery man's good behavior 👏

delivery partners don't need repeated instructions or ask you to come down to recieve the delivery and quick easy methods. product quality is also good and there is a lot of variety to choose from. convenient and reliable 👍🏻. I've only occasionally dealt with problematic delivery guys and products that were bad. so four stars from me. however the estimated delivery time is often unreliable but it's fine it's usually a short wait.
